arts.ttl: Juventus Target Renato Veiga as Giuntoli Seeks Last Minute Defensive Reinforcements
arts.sum: Juventus are scouting the Premier League market to bolster their defensive lineup, with Sporting Director Cristiano Giuntoli aiming to secure at least one, if not two, new defenders. This move comes in response to Bremer's injury and the imminent departure of Danilo, who is expected to terminate his contract and join Napoli. The post Juventus Target Renato Veiga as Giuntoli Seeks Last Minute Defensive Reinforcements appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca drops double Chelsea transfer hint amid Andrey Santos calls and midfielder injuries
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has ruled out the possibility of Chelsea recalling a midfielder from loan in the January transfer window amid injuries to Enzo Fernandez and Romeo Lavia. Maresca revealed on Friday that four players were doubts for Chelsea's Premier League clash with Wolves, including Fernandez and Lavia, who are both suffering with "fatigue or muscle problems".

arts.ttl: Report: £60m Chelsea target is close to reaching agreement with another club with Blues yet to overcome one hurdle
arts.sum: Chelsea need to act if they still want him.

arts.ttl: ‘No doors closed’ as Garnacho holds Napoli and Chelsea talks
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho’s future ‘remains open’ amid interest in the Manchester United winger from Chelsea and Napoli. Garnacho is subject of interest from rival clubs heading into the final week of the January transfer window. arts.ttl: Sources: Chelsea agree fee for Strasbourg's Sarr
arts.sum: Chelsea have agreed a fee in the region of around €13-15 million ($13.5 - $15.6m) for Strasbourg center-back Mamadou Sarr.

arts.ttl: Who is Mamadou Sarr? Meet the £17m defender set to join Chelsea from Strasbourg in summer
Juventus Make New Contacts with Chelsea and Newcastle for Chilwell and Kelly
arts.sum: Juventus continue to be active in the transfer market as they seek to bolster their defensive lineup for manager Thiago Motta. The club's sporting director, Cristiano Giuntoli, is on the hunt for ideal defensive profiles following setbacks in their pursuit of other targets. arts.ttl: Curtis Jones lights Liverpool touchpaper by dubbing Chelsea idol 'better than Mo Salah'

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree January transfer reunion as Enzo Maresca set to lose key figure hours before Wolves
arts.sum: Chelsea have agreed to let recruitment analyst Kyle Macaulay reunite with Graham Potter at West Ham United, football.london understands. After just over two years at the club, Macaulay will join Potter in east London after the former Brighton manager was announced as Julen Lopetegui's replacement earlier this month.
